concerns.detail: Accuses commenter of fabricating or staging claims ('自导自演') without substantiation, constituting an unsupported character judgment rather than addressing factual disagreements.
Challenges commenter's standing via identity questioning ('你到底是不是组里的'), an ad hominem attack on credibility rather than a substantive response to the claims made.
Accuses another user of dishonest motive ('洗地' / whitewashing/shilling) without evidence, constituting a personal attack on character rather than engaging with the factual debate.
